summary: The core result is interesting enough for an ePrint note and plausibly interesting for the formal-verification community, but the current draft is not yet conference-ready because it has not fully earned its venue-facing framing through related-work positioning and a tighter audit trail for the twelve-gap claim.
strengths: The paper has a clear thesis and a nontrivial primary technical result.
The manuscript is stronger as a formal-verification and concrete-security note than as a hardware-security narrative.
